reviews.review_title: The best game I ever played
reviews.review_description: This game is very fun I already made friends, it’s just 10/10

This game took my breath away. I played it together with a friend after I heard about it at the Unite. It feels so different from other Mixed Reality games. Truly involved the technology in the smartest way possible.
My entire wall vanished and transformed into a portal-like view inside of his room. I could see where he stands in his room, which was kind of a weird feeling. It gave a good impression, as if his room was right next to me. Playing the minigames was fun. They are simple but well polished and thought through. 

I think this game should be pre installed to really show what MR can do. 
The only downside of the game is that you need some time to setup the room. Also I found a bug where I set up a room, hopped in game, noticed the room setup isnt perfect and pressed the button and smh couldn't hop back into the game. A reboot did the job.
Anyways lovely game. Well polished. Simple but fun minigames

I played this with my dad and brother and it is so much fun, it’s good exercise, and it made us laugh while playing it. The main problem is that in the balloon game is that they kept spawning in my dresser

Last month I bought Party Versus because I had seen a YouTube video showcasing this game with the YouTuber’s friends, fun right? After I saw that video I downloaded the game immediately, I setup my MR space and the party setup. I tried a lobby and no people, no big deal I joined a different lobby, still nobody I kept joining lobby’s until I found ONE person just ONE. I was so excited to see them because game felt like an abandoned ￼ store. If you can try to make the game popular that would be so wonderful like maybe try advertising your game on Facebook or maybe YouTube but it is so lonely but very fun 😃😃😃

developer_response.body: Thanks for your interest in Party Versus, and for your feedback! The Schell Games Discord server can be a great place to find people to join in a game. Please check out the find-a-party channel at  https://discord.gg/schellgames to find other players.

reviews.review_description:
Especially the big potato was the funniest one, chaos and filling a room with bunch of explosives. This game is what makes me play my quest 3
Thanks devs!!
You should put it on quest 2, but very funny game to play with friends or make friends.
When I play their are no people

developer_response.body: Thanks for your interest in Party Versus! You can join the Schell Games Discord find-a-party channel at  https://discord.gg/schellgames to find other players.

reviews.review_description: Very fun, like the passthrough mode a lot

This game would be great if others were available to play it. I've tried many times to find people to play and only found 3 others on one occasion, and one lone player on another.  It would be so much fun if you knew you'd end up playing someone each time you launched it. 

On the 2 occasions that I found someone to play it was absolutely brilliant fun. Couldn't be more pleased with the game

developer_response.body: Thanks for your interest in Party Versus! Please join the Schell Games Discord find-a-party channel at https://discord.gg/schellgames to find other players.

reviews.review_description:
So I only ever played this game once and it was with a friend. Since it was only two of us we only got to see half of what the game can be 😂 . However even with only two players the games was fun, interactive, enjoyable and even intense at most. I like that fact that other players can see your room setup ( couch, bed, computer and etc.) 

Overall I thoroughly enjoyed my experience with this game and I hope to continue playing and even get a full lobby. 

Add me if you want a real challenge

reviews.review_title: I wish I was fitter so I could play more
reviews.review_description: Liking this game a hellova lot!  It's so strenuous, I can only play 3-4 rounds!  And I'm a streamer that plays beat saber and synth riders for 3-4 hours at a time!  Well done.  I hope there are more games to come.

reviews.review_title: I would like to play but I can't!
reviews.review_description: I’d love to play this game, but I can’t! I live in a one-bedroom apartment, and my only big room is full of furniture, so there’s just no space to play. 😬The game keeps giving me an error saying the room isn’t suitable😡… but where else am I supposed to play?! At work? 🙄That’s not an option. It’s such a shame because the game looks absolutely amazing! 😮‍💨

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are encountering limitations with room setup. Unfortunately Party Versus is not compatible with every room. Please reach out to our Player Support team at https://bit.ly/4gKDdTJ for assistance with optimizing your situation. We would be happy to see if there are any ways we can get you in the game.

reviews.review_description:
This game invents a totally new way of having social interactions in mixed reality by merging the rooms of the people together in a single common play space. The minigames are also fun and foster social interactions. I had a lot of fun with it!

If  you want to read my full review, I have written a very detailed one on my blog Skarredghost
I actually like this game a lot, but the downside is there’s not many people to play with. I am adding people add me back. ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for your interest in Party Versus! Please join the Schell Games Discord find-a-party channel at https://discord.gg/schellgames to find other players.

reviews.review_title: The best use of MR in my eyes
reviews.review_description:
Okay. Hands down the best use of mixed reality. Why? Well first when you scan your room, the layout of your room appears for other players for them to see and interact with. It really adds this level of immersion, as most multiplayer MR game trailers show other people in real life in different rooms joined together in one, but in gameplay it turns out it's not like what it showed.
But this game? This game did that. Joined several rooms into four segments of a cube and it feels really cool as I can get an idea how their room is laid out.

Oh I should talk about the gameplay... It's fun but I couldn't play much matches because not many people own a Quest 3, let alone do they know about this game. But from what I played, it's an amazing mixed reality party game that has fun minigames. There's not much selection, but I hope this game gets big enough to get more updates in the future!

I love the premise, but the lobbies are sometimes very empty and it sucks that you can't manually place your game corner where you want to (for example away from the furniture in the actual corners). Instead you have to artificially not scan parts of your room to make the game place it where it should be.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback about room setup. As for finding people to play with, please join the Schell Games Discord find-a-party channel at https://discord.gg/schellgames to find other players.

reviews.review_description:
Party Versus is a blast - and a great example of the potential for social fun in mixed reality. This game is a lot of fun!

I posted a review on Gaming Trend magazine if you'd like to read more. :)

I've been eagerly awaiting this game and have been following it in advance. Unfortunately, the room layout requirements are almost impossible to meet, no matter which room. I actually have enough space and large rooms (I can play racket tennis and other things, after all), but I can't start this game because of my furniture. That's a shame, because I think the basic idea is brilliant, but I'll probably have to cancel it now.

developer_response.body: Please reach out to our Player Support team at https://bit.ly/4gKDdTJ. We would be happy to work through any difficulties you are encountering with your furniture or room setup.

reviews.review_description: This game makes you feel like you're sharing a room with people to play silly games. It's like Mario Party in MR.

reviews.review_title: I have the same problem as badronz
reviews.review_description: Even though my room is completely empty of furniture and it is a big enough room.

developer_response.body: Try resetting your Space Setup from Physical Space in your Quest’s Settings menu. If that doesn't solve the problem, please reach out to our Player Support team at https://bit.ly/4gKDdTJ so we can help you troubleshoot the situation.

reviews.review_description: Cool game!!!
Would never recommend

Speaking strictly on the experience. 
The game has multiple minigames and has a really cool way of showing off mixed reality. It's quite unique, actually. Definitely worth a try.
I'm sure playing against my teenage son played a factor here, but I'm dead tired after playing the tournament mode. Fun and fast paced, and the "twisted" levels are just the right kind of weird.
easily THE coolest application of MR I've ever seen. lot of fun with friends
I would play but my headset broke but it looks cool
This game was so fun to play! The teamwork and versus games were a thrill and the team I had were a kick! It’s officially one of my favorite games!💖💖✌🏽

I can see others are having difficulties with the space. I managed to set up my room easily and the game is just fantastic. It really feels like you are sharing the space with other people. It just needs more players but the idea is brilliant.
